title: Magnetism
coreIdea: Magnetism arises from moving electric charges.
misconceptions: Magnets are fundamentally different from currents

sections.title: Origin
sections.content: Magnetism is caused by moving charges and relativistic effects.

sections.title: Wire
sections.content: A current creates a circular magnetic field.

sections.title: Solenoid
sections.content: Multiple loops combine to form a uniform field.

sections.title: Bar Magnet
sections.content: Magnets are aligned atomic current loops.

challenges.q: Increasing current increases magnetic field strength.

title: Electric Fields
coreIdea: Fields describe forces, not physical structures.

sections.title: Definition
sections.content: An electric field tells you the force per unit charge.

challenges.q: Electric fields exist even without motion.
